title: Ania Urbanski
role_summary: Colorado-based photographer; credited on the alphabets CAVE RAVE album (2014).
body:
# Ania Urbanski

Colorado-based photographer, online handle @futurebones. Credited on the alphabets **CAVE RAVE** album (2014) with the credit line: *"PHOTO BY ANIA URBANSKI / instagram.com/futurebones."*

Has a profile page on "The 8th Internet" website (sterlingcrispin.com). Limited additional public information available; likely active in Denver creative circles during the alphabets era.

## Sources
- alphabets Bandcamp — CAVE RAVE album credits
